quality.completeness: High. Contains essential mechanical and descriptive details.
quality.clarity: Good. The effect, resource management (charges), and required action are clearly stated.
quality.formatting_notes: The markdown link for 'charm person' should ideally be standardized if a specific format is enforced across the archive, but the current format is readable.

primary_effect.condition: Must be able to see each other, target must be a humanoid

mechanics.mechanical_integrity: Sound. Standard spell effect tied to a limited resource (charges) and requires attunement.

analysis.archivist_notes: The DC 13 saves for the spell align with standard low-to-mid tier enchantment DCs for uncommon items. The mechanics are straightforward and well-defined.
